_readme: Calibration set for the Phase 2 vision classifier (build spec: 15-25 past jobs).
Copy to manifest.json, download the job photos from the KTU Drive folder
(Vendors & Products > Tune up) into calibration/photos/<job>/, and fill in the
level ACTUALLY CHARGED for each job (L1_2, L3, or L4 — SM merges levels 1 and 2).
Use BEFORE photos only. Then run: npm run calibrate
